title: Stop publishing tracked .prism state changes shards and indexes
summary: Remove `.prism/state/changes/**` and any tracked indexes or manifest inventory entries that treat change history as repo-owned snapshot authority, while preserving current semantic shards for memories, concepts, contracts, plans, and durable coordination.

acceptance.label: Tracked publishes no longer write change history shards under `.prism/state/changes/**`
Tracked snapshot indexes and manifests no longer model change history as durable repo-owned state
